title: THE PRINCIPLES OF PROPER FARM CLEANING AND DISINFECTION PROGRAM
description: A guide detailing key principles and procedures for implementing a farm cleaning and disinfection program aimed at reducing microbial loads and infection pressures in livestock facilities. It defines cleaning and disinfection, highlights their purposes, and presents a seven-step protocol including dry cleaning, equipment dismantling, wet cleaning, flushing, drying, maintenance, and final disinfection.
